rule.name: OverrideBothEqualsAndHashcode
rule.message: Ensure you override both equals() and hashCode()
rule.description:
Override both `public Boolean equals(Object obj)`, and `public Integer hashCode()`, or override neither. Even if you are inheriting a hashCode() from a parent class, consider implementing hashCode and explicitly delegating to your superclass.
This is especially important when [Using Custom Types in Map Keys and Sets](https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/atlas.en-us.apexcode.meta/apexcode/langCon_apex_collections_maps_keys_userdefined.htm).
